_about: Data preparation & enrichment (Clean v2, CluedInClean v1 legacy, Enricher, Enrichers, ExternalFeature). Clean v2 lives on /api/v2/clean; v1 (/api/v1/clean) is deprecated and kept for backward compatibility.

POST /api/v2/clean.description: Creates a clean project from the supplied model. Returns 201 Created with the new project, or 400 when the filter rules fail validation. Requires the Preparation.Clean RACI claim.

GET /api/v2/clean.description: Returns paged clean projects filtered by the supplied `CleanProjectFilter`. Requires the Preparation.Clean RACI claim.

GET /api/v2/clean/{projectId}.description: Returns a clean project by id. Returns 404 if it cannot be found.

PUT /api/v2/clean/{projectId}.description: Updates a clean project. Returns 400 with validation details when the filter rules are invalid, 404 if the project cannot be found. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for clean project updates.

DELETE /api/v2/clean/{projectId}.description: Deletes a clean project. Returns 400 when the project's current state does not allow deletion, 404 if it cannot be found. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for clean project deletion.

POST /api/v2/clean/{projectId}/generate.description: Generates the proposed clean changes (results) for a project, transitioning it into the generating state. Returns 400 when the project is in an incompatible state. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline.

GET /api/v2/clean/{projectId}/generation.description: Returns the status of an in-progress generation step. Returns 400 when the project is not currently generating.

POST /api/v2/clean/{projectId}/cancelgen.description: Cancels an in-progress generation. Returns 400 when the project is not in a state that allows cancellation.

POST /api/v2/clean/{projectId}/commit.description: Commits the generated changes back to the entities. Body contains the stale-data strategy and `AutoGenerateRules` flag. Returns 400 when the project is not in a state that allows commit. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline.

POST /api/v2/clean/{projectId}/generater.description: Generates processing rules that capture the clean project's transformations. Useful for promoting one-off cleanups into permanent rules.

GET /api/v2/clean/{projectId}/committing.description: Returns the status of an in-progress commit step.

POST /api/v2/clean/{projectId}/cancelcom.description: Cancels an in-progress commit. Returns 400 when the project is not in a state that allows cancellation.

POST /api/v2/clean/{projectId}/undochang.description: Reverts the changes a clean project committed. Returns 400 when the project is not in a state that allows undo.

GET /api/v2/clean/{projectId}/undochange.description: Returns the status of an in-progress undo step.

POST /api/v2/clean/{projectId}/cancelund.description: Cancels an in-progress undo. Returns 400 when the project is not in a state that allows cancellation.

GET /api/v2/clean/{projectId}/cleanedent.description: Returns the entities that have been cleaned by a project.

POST /api/v1/clean/createprojects.description: **Deprecated** (Clean V1). Creates one or more OpenRefine cleaning projects from the supplied model. Use the Clean V2 endpoints instead.

POST /api/v1/clean/createprojects/entiti.description: **Deprecated** (Clean V1). Creates cleaning projects for a list of entities. Returns 404 when an entity cannot be found.

POST /api/v1/clean/createprojects/entity.description: **Deprecated** (Clean V1). Creates a cleaning project for the supplied entity id, asynchronously. Returns 202 Accepted.

POST /api/v1/clean/createprojects/relate.summary: Create clean projects for related entities (legacy)
POST /api/v1/clean/createprojects/relate.description: **Deprecated** (Clean V1). Creates cleaning projects for entities related to the supplied entity via the supplied edge type, asynchronously.

POST /api/v1/clean/saveproject.description: **Deprecated** (Clean V1). Saves a cleaning project: when `Feature.Clean.CreateClues` is enabled, generates clues from the cleaned data and publishes a commit event. Otherwise returns 200 with `"Request received but creation of clues is disabled."`.

GET /api/v1/clean/get-access-token.description: **Deprecated** (Clean V1). Returns an access token that OpenRefine uses when calling back to CluedIn for reconciliation and clustering.

GET /api/v1/clean/getprojects.description: **Deprecated** (Clean V1). Returns the cleaning projects in the OpenRefine workspace.

GET /api/v1/clean/getprojectbyid.description: **Deprecated** (Clean V1). Returns a cleaning project by id. Returns 500 when the project is missing or corrupt.

GET /api/v1/clean/getexportbyid.description: **Deprecated** (Clean V1). Returns the exported state of a cleaning project (defaults to JSON).

DELETE /api/v1/clean/deleteproject.description: **Deprecated** (Clean V1). Deletes a cleaning project and publishes a remove event.

GET /api/v1/clean/getsuggestedrules.summary: Get suggested rules from clean project (legacy)
GET /api/v1/clean/getsuggestedrules.description: **Deprecated** (Clean V1). Returns rules suggested for a cleaning project.

GET /api/v1/integration/enricher/all.description: Returns the external-search enrichers registered on the platform (id, name, version, priority, type, icon URL, supported domain, properties, etc.). Requires the Integrations.Enrichment RACI claim.

GET /api/v1/integration/enricher/{id}.description: Returns a single enricher by id. Returns 404 if no enricher with that id is registered.

GET /api/v1/integration/enricher/{id}/de.description: Returns detailed metadata for an enricher (enrich source, lookup/returned entity types, lookup/returned vocabularies and keys) read from the enricher's class-level attributes. Returns 404 if the enricher cannot be found.

GET /api/v1/integration/enricher/icon/{i.description: Returns the embedded icon resource for an enricher. Allowed anonymously (`AllowAnonymous`). Returns 404 if the enricher or its icon cannot be found, 400 for empty/invalid ids.

GET /api/v1/integration/enricher/{provid.description: Returns the active distributed jobs running for the supplied enricher provider definition.

POST /api/v1/integration/enricher/{provi.description: Triggers an enrichment job for the entities matching the supplied criteria using the enricher associated with the provider definition.
Uploads a custom icon for an enricher provider definition.
Resets an enricher provider definition's icon to the enricher's built-in default.
Asks the enricher behind the supplied provider id to verify the authentication data in the body. Returns 400 if the enricher does not implement `IExternalSearchProviderWithVerifyConnection`.

DELETE /api/v1/integration/enricher/exte.description: Deletes any persisted external search queries for the supplied enricher provider definition.

GET /api/v1/integration/enricher/externa.summary: Check whether external search queries exist
GET /api/v1/integration/enricher/externa.description: Returns whether any persisted external search queries exist for the supplied enricher provider definition.

POST /api/enrichers/checkforupgrades.description: Returns whether the caller's enrichers need to be upgraded to a newer schema. Used as a pre-check before a platform upgrade.

GET /api/v1/externalfeature/{type}.description: Returns visible external features registered on the platform that match the supplied feature type. Used by the UI to discover dynamic tabs and integrations.

POST /api/v1/externalfeature/url.description: Generates a dynamic URL for a visible external feature given its type, id, and a property dictionary used by the feature to build the URL. Returns 404 when no matching feature is found, 500 (problem details) when the body is missing the type.
